request: Replace unconditional git push hard-block in git_commit_guard with a branch-aware consent policy driven by project.json git.protected_branches (glob list, default null = every branch protected) and git.branch_pattern (regex, opt-out via null). Add a /grant-push consent gate symmetric with /grant-commit. Resolves Q-004. Touches hooks, new command, project.json schema, CLAUDE.md Articles IV/VII/VIII, seed.md sections 6/13/14, audit-baseline, and src/ ship-time templates.

completed_notes.tdd: satisfied via swarm path (swarm-plan + swarm-dispatch); track_guard literal-match workaround per seed.md §16 retrospective
